summary: Gardner soundboard capture of the 11/11/73 show with a soaring Dark Star and strong setlist, though pitch quirks and occasional speed issues temper the listening experience.
review: Fans rave about this Winterland performance – the 35‑minute Dark Star, a dynamic China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, and a hot Big River rank it among the top shows of ’73. The Gardner SBD source is generally good but suffers from pitch errors, a fast‑running wow and brief right‑channel loss that require correction.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 5‑star praise for the musical performance while one detailed review flags notable recording flaws; weighting show quality (70%) and recording quality (30%) yields a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch errors and slow/long wow across the tape; runs fast in places, occasional right‑channel loss around the Eyes segment (fixable by mono). Overall the Gardner SBD sounds fuller than other sources despite these issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
And We Bid You Good Night
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is an average ’73 outing with a few rough spots, while the second set climbs to peak energy – highlighted by the marathon Dark Star and tight band interplay before a heartfelt close.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Long leash on Big River; great improvisation in the first half of the second set but becomes sloppy toward the end.
band_member_comments.Phil: Monster bass section inside the Dark Star is noted as a highlight.
band_member_comments.Drums: Billy's shuffling pocket drives the groove, especially on Big River.
